hero.title: There Is No Place Like Home
hero.subtitle: Premium heating solutions for your home — designed for comfort, built to last.

whoWeAre.title: Egypt's Trusted Heating Specialists
whoWeAre.body: Heatec Solutions is a Cairo-based company, founded in 2022 on a foundation of 20+ years of staff expertise in residential and commercial heating systems. We partner with the world's leading brands to bring you energy-efficient, reliable, and elegant solutions for every space.

solutions.heading: Comfort Anywhere
solutions.subtitle: Comprehensive heating solutions tailored for Egyptian homes and compounds.

spaceHeating.title: Space Heating
spaceHeating.subtitle: From underfloor heating and wall radiators to Thermaskirt and designer fireplaces.

products.name: Underfloor Heating
products.description: The most comfortable and efficient way to heat your home — delivering even warmth from the floor up, completely invisible, and compatible with all floor finishes.
features: Even heat distribution from floor to ceiling
100% invisible installation — no wall space used
Up to 40% more energy-efficient than radiators
Compatible with all floor types: tile, marble, wood, carpet

products.name: Wall Radiators
products.description: A classic, reliable heating solution with modern aluminium designs for fast, effective warmth that heats and cools quickly in response to your thermostat.
features: Fast response time — heats up and cools down quickly
Elegant aluminium design with curved surfaces
High heat output, available from 6 to 20 sections
Easy to clean, brilliant white powder-coated finish

products.name: Thermaskirt
products.description: Imagine a home without radiators. ThermaSkirt is an innovative heating system hidden inside the skirting boards, freeing up every wall and delivering true radiant heat in minutes.
features: Completely hidden inside skirting boards — no visible heaters
Frees up all wall space — furniture anywhere you want
True radiant heat with minimal air movement or draughts
Works with any floor finish and any boiler or heat pump

products.name: CosyStone Radiators
products.description: Ultra-flat designer radiators in natural stone finishes — only 6.2cm thick. They integrate seamlessly into any interior, available in marble, stone, and custom colour options.
features: Natural stone & marble finishes — unique to every room
Radiation-based warmth for gentle, even comfort
Anti-fog mirror version available for bathrooms

products.name: Fireplaces
products.description: Premium European gas and wood fireplaces bringing cosy ambiance and effective heating to any room. The Barbas Bellfires collection combines Dutch engineering with contemporary design.
features: Natural gas, LPG, and wood-burning options

hotWater.title: Domestic Hot Water
hotWater.subtitle: Gas, electric, solar, and heat pump water heaters for every home.

products.name: Gas Storage Water Heater
products.description: Reliable large-volume hot water supply for residential and commercial applications. Features a Blue Diamond® glass lining and Coregard™ stainless steel anode rod for outstanding corrosion resistance.
features: Blue Diamond® glass lining for superior corrosion protection

products.name: Electric Storage Water Heater
products.description: Efficient and easy to install, with advanced insulation for maximum heat retention. Incoloy stainless steel elements outlast standard copper — delivering consistent hot water for years.
features: Advanced insulation for minimal heat loss
Incoloy stainless steel elements — last longer than copper
Coregard™ anode rod for extra corrosion protection

products.name: Tankless Water Heater
products.description: Endless hot water on demand — no storage tank needed. A compact, space-saving design with high energy efficiency: you only heat the water you actually use.
features: Hot water instantly, on demand — no waiting
Lower energy bills — no standby heat loss

products.name: Solar Water Heater
products.description: Harness Egypt's abundant sunshine to heat your water for free. An eco-friendly system with high-performance solar collectors and a reliable backup element for cloudy days.
features: Uses free solar energy — drastically reduces bills

products.name: Heat Pump Water Heater
products.description: High-efficiency heat pump water heater with over 75% energy savings vs electric resistance heaters. Heats water up to 75°C with an intuitive LED display controller.
features: Over 75% energy savings vs electric resistance heaters

pool.title: Swimming Pool Heating
pool.subtitle: Keep your pool warm year-round with efficient heat pumps and gas heaters.

products.name: Heat Pump
products.description: The most cost-effective way to keep your pool warm year-round. Heat pumps transfer warmth from the outdoor air into your pool water — using very little electricity for very high output.
features: COP up to 16 — extremely low operating costs
Smart control app for your phone

products.name: Gas Pool Heater
products.description: Rapidly heats your pool water regardless of weather or season. Direct gas heating with no separate heat exchanger — simple installation and lower upfront cost.
features: Fast water heating — ready to swim quickly
Uses existing pool recirculation pump — no extra pump needed

products.name: Commercial Pool Heat Pump
products.description: Full DC Inverter commercial heat pump from 50kW to 190kW. Intelligently adjusts heat output to match demand — cutting operational costs for hotels, clubs, and large compounds.
features: Group control for up to 16 units

items.title: Energy Efficient
items.desc: Reduce your energy consumption without sacrificing comfort.

items.title: Free Up Wall Space
items.desc: Underfloor and Thermaskirt systems keep your walls clear.

items.title: Fast & Responsive
items.desc: Quick installation and responsive after-sales support.

items.title: Simple Installation
items.desc: Engineered for straightforward fitting by our certified team.

items.title: Works With Any Floor
items.desc: Compatible with tile, marble, wood, and carpet finishes.

items.title: True Aftersales
items.desc: We stand behind every installation with ongoing maintenance.

fireplaces.heading: Barbas Bellfires Collection
fireplaces.subtitle: Bringing European warmth and design to Egyptian homes.

products.name: Evolux Fireplace
products.desc: A panoramic, double-sided gas fireplace delivering dramatic visual impact and efficient radiant heat.

products.name: Gas Fire Panorama
products.desc: A wide-view gas fire with a realistic flame effect, ideal for open-plan living areas.

fireplaces.page_subheading: Luxury European fireplaces — where warmth meets design.
fireplaces.brand_body: Founded in the Netherlands, Barbas Bellfires is one of Europe's most respected fireplace brands. Heatec Solutions is the exclusive distributor in Egypt, bringing a curated selection of gas and wood-burning models to Egyptian homes.

evolux.name: Evolux
evolux.body: A stunning two-sided panoramic gas fireplace. The Evolux creates a floating flame visible from two rooms — an architectural centrepiece as much as a heating appliance.

panorama.name: Gas Fire Panorama
panorama.body: Wide-angle single-sided gas fireplace with a large glass front and a strikingly realistic flame. Ideal for living rooms and open-plan spaces.

wood.name: Wood-Burning Fireplaces
wood.body: For those who love the crackle and scent of real wood, Barbas Bellfires offers contemporary wood-burning models engineered for high combustion efficiency and low emissions.

fireplaces.cta_heading: Bring European Fireplace Design to Your Home
fireplaces.cta_body: Visit our showroom or contact us for a personalised recommendation.

getInTouch.subtitle: Ready to upgrade your home's heating? Contact us today.

about.heading: Innovating For Tomorrow
about.body: Heatec Solutions was founded in Cairo with a clear purpose: making premium European heating technology accessible to Egyptian homeowners and developers. Founded in 2022, our company is built on a foundation of veteran leadership — our core technical and management staff bring over 20 years of specialised heating expertise to every project.

items.title: Expert Team
items.desc: Certified engineers with deep product knowledge and hands-on installation experience.

items.title: Trusted Advice
items.desc: We only recommend what genuinely suits your space and budget — no overselling.

items.title: Best Practices
items.desc: Every installation follows manufacturer standards and industry best practices.

projects.heading: Trusted by Premium Compounds
projects.subtitle: Trusted by premium compounds and residential projects across Egypt
